meta.title: LemonSpace - Visual workspace for creative teams
meta.description: A visual canvas where your brand assets become campaigns. Upload, edit, organize, compare, and export in one place. Self-hosted or managed. Source-available.
meta.ogTitle: LemonSpace - Visual workspace for creative teams

hero.headline: The visual workspace where your brand assets become campaigns
hero.subheadline: *Upload your brand assets, edit and organize them on a visual canvas, run agent workflows, and export campaign-ready results in one place. Optional AI generation when needed.
hero.privacyNote: No spam. We'll email you when the beta opens.

issue.label: The issue
issue.headline: Your image workflow lives in eight browser tabs.
issue.b1: Something needs your attention. Is it tab three? Tab five? You're clicking through all eight trying to find the one that's screaming. By the time you find it, another tool has already timed out.
issue.b2: You generated twelve variants but they're scattered across folders, chats, and downloads. Comparing them means opening six windows side by side and hoping you don't lose track.
issue.b3: Every asset, every edit, every variant lives on someone else's infrastructure. When confidentiality matters, parking your brand in yet another SaaS is a tough sell to legal.

fix.label: The fix
fix.headline: One canvas. From upload to export.
fix.subheadline: LemonSpace puts your visual workflow on one board - upload, organize, edit non-destructively, run agent workflows, compare outcomes, and export. Optional AI generation when you need it.

canvas.title: Visual Canvas
canvas.desc: Your workflow lives on a node-based canvas. Drop in assets, connect edits and transformations, branch ideas, and see the full flow at a glance.

prompt.title: Asset Library
prompt.desc: Upload and organize brand assets, reference images, and approved templates in one shared library. Tag, version, and reuse assets across every canvas.

compare.title: Non-destructive Editing
compare.desc: Adjust curves, color, light, and detail directly on the canvas. Reorder edits anytime, branch variants from one source, and keep your original assets untouched.

export.title: Agent Workflows
export.desc: Connect an Agent node for multi-step creative jobs. Define the goal, review the plan, adjust parameters, and ship with your team still in control.

library.title: Compare and Export
library.desc: Review variants side by side, pick winners, and export to web, social, and print formats. Save presets once and reuse them across campaigns.

selfhosted.title: Self-Hosted
selfhosted.desc: Run LemonSpace on your own infrastructure. Your assets and workflows stay under your control with Docker, Kubernetes, or bare metal. Source-available under BSL 1.1.

how.label: How it Works
how.headline: From idea to campaign in minutes

step1.title: Upload
step1.desc: Drop your brand assets and reference images onto the canvas. Tag them and keep your library organized.

step2.title: Build workflow
step2.desc: Connect nodes for organizing, editing, transforming, and comparing. Add AI generation only when you need something new.

step3.title: Refine
step3.desc: Adjust curves, color, and light non-destructively. Run agent workflows, review outcomes, and keep control at every step.

step4.title: Export
step4.desc: Pick winners, export to your campaign formats, and ship.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.headline: Simple, credit-based pricing
pricing.subheadline: Credits power premium operations. Start free, scale when needed.
pricing.info: Credits cover AI generation, agent runs, and premium model access. Editing, organizing, comparing, and exporting are always included.

starter.title: Starter
starter.desc: 400 Credits/month - Premium models - Email support - Multiple workspaces

max.title: Max
max.desc: 6,700 Credits/month - Everything in Pro - Dedicated support - API access

waitlist.success: You are on the list. Thank you.
waitlist.already: You already joined from this device.
waitlist.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.ctaSub: We're building LemonSpace for creative teams who want one place to manage their visual workflow - from brand assets to finished campaigns. Join the waitlist and we'll let you know when the beta opens.

footer.tagline: Visual workspace for small creative teams. In active development.
footer.note: Self-hosted and source-available are on the roadmap - this is not a finished product pitch.
